zh.lifeSummary: 當Maredudd ap Rhydderch於大約1136年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾費時，他的父親Rhydderch Ap Bledri39歲，母親Elen ferch Lewys23歲。他於1169年與Tangwystl verch Rhys在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾費結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Rhydderch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Roderick
meanings: Welsh (Glamorgan): Anglicized form of the Welsh personal name Rhydderch (British Celtic Rodercos, presumably meaning ‘great seer’ or ‘most high’), the name of a prominent figure in first-millennium Welsh history. Compare Prothero .

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Maredudd ap Rhydderch was born about 1136, in Gwynfe, Carmarthenshire, Wales, his father, Rhydderch Ap Bledri, was 39 and his mother, Elen ferch Lewys, was 23. He married Tangwystl verch Rhys in 1169, in Gwynfe, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maredudd ap Rhydderch est né environ 1136, à Gwynfe, Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Rhydderch Ap Bledri, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Elen ferch Lewys, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Tangwystl verch Rhys en 1169, à Gwynfe, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles.

ja.lifeSummary: Maredudd ap Rhydderchが約1136年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアグウインフで生まれた時，父Rhydderch Ap Bledriは39歳，母Elen ferch Lewysは23歳であった。1169年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアグウインフでTangwystl verch Rhysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。

ko.Llangadog Fawr, Carmarthenshire, Wales: 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 랭가도그 인 키드웰이
ko.lifeSummary: Maredudd ap Rhydderch(이)가 대략 1136년 웨일스 카마테실르 그윈프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rhydderch Ap Bledri(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Elen ferch Lewys(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1169년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 그윈프에서 Tangwystl verch Rhys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.Llangadog Fawr, Carmarthenshire, Wales: ллангадог ин кидвелли, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maredudd ap Rhydderch родился около 1136 г. в местности гвинф, кармартеншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Rhydderch Ap Bledri было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Elen ferch Lewys, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Tangwystl verch Rhys в 1169 г. в местности гвинф, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери.
